question: I was just diagnosed with stage 3 breast cancer. My oncologist mentioned chemotherapy before surgery. Why do chemo first instead of removing the tumor first?

I'm starting chemotherapy next week. What side effects should I prepare for and what can be done to prevent nausea?
My PSA has risen after prostate cancer treatment. What does a PSA recurrence mean and what options are available?
My oncologist mentioned clinical trials as an option. Should I consider enrolling in a clinical trial and how do I find out if I qualify?
I have stage 4 pancreatic cancer. My oncologist mentioned palliative chemotherapy. What is the difference between curative and palliative intent?
My breast cancer is HER2-positive. My oncologist wants to add trastuzumab to my chemotherapy. How does HER2-targeted therapy work?
After my cancer treatment I'm experiencing cognitive problems and memory issues. Is this 'chemo brain' real and does it go away?
I finished cancer treatment a year ago. What surveillance is recommended to detect recurrence early?
I started pembrolizumab for lung cancer and developed severe diarrhea. My oncologist said this could be an immune-related side effect. How serious is this?
I have stage 2 colon cancer. My oncologist is recommending adjuvant chemotherapy. Is it necessary if the cancer was fully removed at surgery?
I was diagnosed with cancer of unknown primary. How do oncologists approach finding the origin and treating CUP?
My oncologist ordered a comprehensive genomic profiling test. What is this and how does it change treatment decisions?
I have metastatic melanoma. The immunotherapy stopped working. What second-line treatments are available?
My chemotherapy has dropped my white blood cell count severely. My oncologist prescribed G-CSF injections. What does this medication do?

My cancer has spread to my bones. Will the bone metastases cause fractures and how are they treated?
I was told I need a PET scan and a CT scan. Why are both needed and what does each show that the other doesn't?
I am a cancer survivor and want to know if I should take supplements like antioxidants or turmeric. Are there any safety concerns?
My oncologist mentioned tumor mutational burden and PD-L1 expression as biomarkers. What do these tests predict?
My husband has terminal cancer and we are discussing stopping treatment. How does palliative care differ from giving up?
I was just diagnosed with a BRCA1 mutation. How does this affect my cancer risk and my family members' risk?
I have spinal cord compression from a metastasis and am losing strength in my legs. My oncologist says this is an oncologic emergency. What are the treatment options?
My doctor wants to perform a liquid biopsy. What is a ctDNA test and how reliable is it compared to a tissue biopsy?
I have triple-negative breast cancer. My oncologist said this type is harder to treat. Why and what are the current treatment options?
I was told my cancer is MSI-high. My oncologist is very excited about this. What does MSI-high mean for my treatment options?

My cancer treatment is causing severe peripheral neuropathy in my hands and feet. Is this permanent and can anything be done?
I have a suspicious adrenal mass and my oncologist wants to biopsy it. What are the risks of a percutaneous adrenal biopsy and are there situations where it should be avoided?
